title: IG11 0AD: Thames Water Utilities Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/PB3238RK/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Thames Water Utilities Limited Installation name: Beckton Sludge Treatment Centre Permit number: EPR/PB3238RK/V004  "
